description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the centos:latest Docker image and runs a before_script to install wget and tar via yum, download the Gutenberg v0.3.1 tarball from GitHub, and extract it. Define a deploy stage with a pages job that executes the commands: echo 'Build...', ls, and ./gutenberg build, then publishes the resulting public/ directory as a pages artifact. Configure the pages job to run only on the master branch.
